summary: Tested /analisi-in-preparazione page for Evolution PRO OS. All 6 sections are present and working correctly. The page is accessible only for users with pagamento_analisi=true and redirects to homepage for users without payment.

minor.issue: Login endpoint looks in 'clienti' collection but cliente_analisi users are stored in 'users' collection. Users must use /api/auth/login instead.
Auth response doesn't include 'user_type' field for cliente_analisi users. Frontend relies on localStorage manipulation to set user_type.

passed_tests: ✅ Page /analisi-in-preparazione loads correctly for users with pagamento_analisi=true
✅ Section 1: Progress bar shows 3 steps - Questionario (completato), Analisi Strategica (IN PREPARAZIONE), Call con Claudio (IN ATTESA)
✅ Section 2: Conferma pagamento badge 'Pagamento completato' is visible
✅ Section 3: 'Cosa succede adesso' section with 5 bullet points
✅ Section 4: Video di benvenuto with Quick_Avatar_Video.mp4 - play button works
✅ Section 5: Mini corso with 7 clickable modules (Il Blueprint, Argomenti che vendono, Durata delle lezioni, Funnel di vendita, ADV, Profili social, Non fare tutto da solo)
✅ Section 6: 'Come prepararti alla call strategica' with 3 bullet points
✅ Redirect to homepage works for users without pagamento_analisi=true
✅ All 7 modules are clickable with data-testid attributes
✅ Video player loads and plays correctly
✅ Logout button is present and accessible
critical_code_review_comments: The auth flow for cliente_analisi users requires manual localStorage manipulation to set user_type. Consider updating /api/auth/login to include user_type in response for cliente_analisi users.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 6 sections verified, all 7 modules clickable, redirect working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user att2_1773352332@test.com with pagamento_analisi=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /analisi-in-preparazione page is fully functional. All 6 sections are present: Progress bar, Conferma pagamento, Cosa succede adesso (5 points), Video benvenuto (Quick_Avatar_Video.mp4), Mini corso (7 modules), Preparazione call (3 points). Access control works - users without pagamento_analisi=true are redirected to homepage. Note: cliente_analisi users need user_type set in localStorage for proper routing.

verified_features.progress_bar: WORKING - Shows Questionario (completato), Analisi Strategica (IN PREPARAZIONE), Call con Claudio (IN ATTESA)
verified_features.mini_corso_7_moduli: WORKING - All 7 modules clickable: Il Blueprint, Argomenti che vendono, Durata delle lezioni, Funnel di vendita, ADV, Profili social, Non fare tutto da solo
verified_features.redirect_no_payment: WORKING - Users without pagamento_analisi=true redirected to homepage
